backtrader_static_analysis.license_observed: GNU GPL v3; setup.py marks GPLv3+

architecture_gray_areas.question: Backtrader 是 optional semantic reference、adapter，还是主路径迁移候选？
architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: CR25-A design reference + clean-room interface adaptation; lightweight remains default.

architecture_gray_areas.question: 哪些 Backtrader 模块可借鉴、可适配、可移植候选、必须排除？
architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: Use module classification matrix; no default source-level migration candidate.

architecture_gray_areas.question: GPLv3 对源码复制、裁剪、改写和分发的影响是什么？
architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: Default no-copy clean-room adaptation; source migration requires CP3 risk acceptance and CP5 authorization.
hld_refs: process/HLD.md#345-backtrader-本地项目模块级分析矩阵

architecture_gray_areas.question: lightweight baseline、Backtrader semantic reference 与 QMT order intent 如何对齐？
architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: Freeze clean feed gate, semantic diff schema and order_intent_draft_v1.

architecture_gray_areas.question: CR-025 与 CR-020 gateway health 的顺序和接口边界如何表达？
architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: CR-025 only emits draft/evidence; CR-020..CR-024 remain independently authorized production route CRs.

recommended_option_summary: Backtrader is a design/reference-only optional semantic reference by default; implementation uses clean-room contracts and no source migration.
alternative_options: CR25-B optional dependency runtime after CP5
CR25-C source migration/fork only after explicit CP3/CP5 and compliance acceptance
CR25-D no Backtrader reference if user withdraws requirement
non_authorized_items: copy or migrate Backtrader source code
non_blocking_open_items: CP5 后若实现 optional runtime，需要冻结 dependency version、file ownership、adapter output path 和 packaging/legal strategy。
next_action: meta-po reviews CP3 auto precheck and, if accepted, launches checkpoints/CP3-CR025-HLD-REVIEW.md for manual confirmation.
